features: 【Ideal Shower Experience】KISUOMAOYI bath loofah help gently exfoliating dispel dull skin ,with soap to protect your skin heathy，gently rejuvenation
【Dense Fluffy Mesh】 The loofah shower sponge makes it hold up well and creates a rich lather with just a small amount of shower gel or soap.Our bath sponge is difficult to unravel.

【How To Use】Mesh Exfoliating Bath & Shower Sponges, ready to use, wet with warm water, apply soap or shower gel and gently massgae in circular motions to gently exfoliate, leaving skin feeling clean and soft
【Reusable】 Wash the shower scrunchie with water after every use for future bathing. Cord hanging design enables our loofah sponge to get dry by hanging it from the additional long-ribbon
【Colourful Color】Perfect gift of body scrubber for women and men,enjoy a nice shower experience after a whole day of hard work or exercise
description: Product Description Soft and Durable Loofah Bath Sponge Super soft rich foam clean skin mildly fluffy, shower puff for body bring your perfect shower experience. The shower sponge uses an upgraded tight knot design to make bath sponge tighter and Love your skin with indulgent rich bubbly lather. With a long ribbon ,durable with excellent process bath sponge is easy to dry and store.Easy to Hang and Store Product Name: Bath Ball Product material: Polyethylene resin material Product weight: about 50 grams Product size: diameter 12 centimeters Product color: blue, pink,white,green,khaki
